calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Debrenia Madison, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
10:00am
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Mr. Andrew Steinfeld, Esq.,appears for respondent A. Berger; Mr. Kenneth A. Lipson, Esq., appears for the appellant Slavic Post, Inc. Both counsel give opening statements.
Mr. Steinfeld calls 1st witness for respondent, LELLY MERCHERITSKY, and begins direct examination:
EXHA Customs receipt, shipping document
EXXB Customs receipt, shipping document, #1550010
10:20am
Cross-examination by Mr. Lipson
(Exhibits 1 & 2 from related case #028036, are introduced, but not admitted in this case.)
Exhibits A & B, previously identified, shown to the witness
11:02am
No further questions, witness is excused. Mr. Lipson begins case in chief by calling 1st witness, EMMA SIMONYANTS, previously sworn, and begins direct examination: (Grandson, Armen Gasanyan, translated English into Russian, and Russion into English.)
(Exhibits 1 & 2 from related case #028036, are introduced, but not admitted in this case.)
11:25am
Cross-examination by Mr. Steinfeld
11:30am
No further questions, witness is excused. Mr. Lipson calls 2nd witnes, ALEX BERGER, and begins direct examination
12:12pm
Cross-examination by Mr. Steinfeld
12:15pm
No further questions, witness is excused. Mr. Steinfeld gives closing statements
12:20pm
Closing statements by Mr. Lipson
12:25pm
Rebuttal closing by Mr. Steinfeld
12:30pm
Matter is submitted

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-17-2006 Continued To May-31-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-10-2006 Continued To Mar-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-13-2006 Continued To Feb-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 11:30am
Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey S. Ross, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Andrew Steinfeld appearing for Alex Berger, respondent; Egor Stadnik, appellant appears in Pro Per. (Mr. Stadnik appears with a Russion interpreter Anna Levinton, who interprets Russian to English and English to Russian.)Parties and counsel testify in the narrative. Evidence is reviewed but not retained. Judgment for indemnity on the claim on case #028036 will be moot as judgment will be entered for A. Berger in 028036.
Judgment will be vacated on case #028018 on 2/1/06 unless respondent Emma Simonyants (in #028036) files a timely and successful motion to vacate, or motion for rehearing. In that even A. Berger, on Slavic Post shall appear on 2/26/06, 9am, Dept. 525, to address that issue.
11:50am
Cases 028018 & 028036 are hereby consolidated per Court order for all further purposes; O28018 to be the lead case number.Court adjourns

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-12-2006 Text Ruling
